page: Microsoft Azure EC32as_v5 is an x86_64 architecture server instance belonging to the ECASv5 family. It features 32 dedicated vCPUs powered by an AMD processor and runs on the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor. The instance is configured with 192.0 GB of system memory, yielding a memory-to-core ratio of 6.0 GB per vCPU.

This server configuration does not include local storage, meaning all storage requirements must be met via external block storage, though the instance is designated as Premium Storage capable. There are no onboard GPUs, which limits its applicability for hardware-accelerated graphics or deep learning workloads. Additionally, the instance provides zero complimentary public IPv4 addresses.

From a cost-efficiency perspective, the EC32as_v5 offers a high memory-to-vCPU density within the AMD-based hardware class, making it a viable option for memory-intensive workloads that do not require local scratch space or GPU acceleration. It is structured for workloads such as relational databases, enterprise applications, in-memory caching systems, and medium-scale data processing tasks.
description: Microsoft Azure EC32as_v5 is an x86_64 architecture server instance within the ECASv5 family, powered by an AMD processor and managed via the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor. It features 32 dedicated vCPUs and 192.0 GB of system memory, providing a ratio of 6.0 GB of RAM per core. The instance lacks local storage, relying instead on its Premium Storage capability for external block storage integration. With zero onboard GPUs and no complimentary public IPv4 addresses, this server is designed for workloads requiring substantial memory capacity without the need for local disk performance or hardware acceleration. The resource profile makes it suitable for memory-intensive applications, enterprise databases, and data processing tasks.
og_description: Microsoft Azure EC32as_v5 is an x86_64 server with 32 dedicated AMD vCPUs, 192 GB RAM, and Premium Storage capability, designed for memory-intensive enterprise workloads without local storage.
meta_description: Microsoft Azure EC32as_v5 is an x86_64 server featuring 32 dedicated AMD vCPUs, 192 GB of RAM, and Premium Storage capability for memory-intensive workloads.
tagline: An AMD-powered, memory-dense server configuration featuring thirty-two dedicated virtual cores and support for premium external block storage.
bullet_points: 32 dedicated vCPUs powered by an AMD processor on x86_64 architecture
192.0 GB of system memory providing 6.0 GB of RAM per virtual core
Premium Storage capable configuration with no local storage included
Zero onboard GPUs and zero complimentary public IPv4 addresses
Designed for memory-intensive workloads, databases, and enterprise applications
